name: Tim Cook
title: Chief Executive Officer
description: Leads Apple's overall strategy, operations, and corporate direction as the company's top executive.

name: Luca Maestri
title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
description: Oversees Apple's financial operations, reporting, and capital allocation strategies.

name: Jeff Williams
title: Chief Operating Officer
description: Manages Apple's global operations including supply chain, manufacturing, and customer care.

name: Katherine Adams
title: Senior Vice President and General Counsel
description: Leads Apple's legal, government affairs, and compliance functions worldwide.

name: Eddy Cue
title: Senior Vice President, Services
description: Oversees Apple's services portfolio including the App Store, Apple Music, Apple TV+, and iCloud.

name: Craig Federighi
title: Senior Vice President, Software Engineering
description: Leads engineering and development of iOS, macOS, iPadOS, and other Apple operating systems.

name: John Ternus
title: Senior Vice President, Hardware Engineering
description: Oversees the design and engineering of all Apple hardware products including iPhone, Mac, and iPad.

name: Deirdre O'Brien
title: Senior Vice President, Retail and People
description: Leads Apple's global retail operations and human resources functions.

name: Greg Joswiak
title: Senior Vice President, Worldwide Marketing
description: Oversees Apple's global marketing strategy, product positioning, and brand communications.

name: Johny Srouji
title: Senior Vice President, Hardware Technologies
description: Leads the development of Apple's custom silicon, including the Apple A-series and M-series chips.
